news.headline: Top legal AI platform Leya rebrands as Legora, introducing agentic research tools and Microsoft Word add-in.
news.summary: A prominent legal AI platform, Leya, has undergone rebranding and is now known as Legora. The rebranding comes with notable enhancements, such as new product features like agentic research tools and a Microsoft Word add-in.

news.headline: DigitalChalk in NC introduces Public Catalog Pages for boosting course visibility and engagement; no login needed.
news.summary: Asheville, North Carolina - DigitalChalk has introduced Public Catalog Pages to enhance visibility of courses without requiring a login. This move aims to increase discovery, engagement, and conversions for the platform.

news.headline: REV Group (NYSE: REVG) to release Q1 fiscal 2025 results on March 5, 2025, with a live webcast at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: In Brookfield, Wisconsin, REV Group, Inc. (NYSE: REVG) revealed its intention to unveil its first quarter fiscal 2025 outcomes before the market opens on Wednesday, March 5, 2025. The discussion of these results will take place during a live webcast on the same day, starting at 10:00 a.m. ET. Investors who wish to join the webcast should visit www.revgroup.com at least 15 minutes ahead of the event. Presentation slides will be accessible on the website before the commencement of the webcast.

news.headline: 1547's 2nd Annual Aloha Charity Fishing Tournament raised $30,000 for Maui relief, supporting recovery efforts and local businesses.
news.summary: In Honolulu, the 2nd Annual Aloha Charity Fishing Tournament organized by 1547 successfully raised $30,000 for Maui relief efforts. The funds will be used to support local businesses and aid in the recovery process in anticipation of PTC'25.

news.headline: IKO Commercial reveals new products at IRE 2025, including rooftop access app. Leading in roofing, waterproofing.
news.summary: In San Antonio, Texas on February 19, 2025, IKO Commercial, a branch of IKO Industries Inc., a global top player in the roofing, waterproofing, and insulation sectors for both residential and commercial markets, announced its involvement in the 2025 International Roofing Expo (IRE).

news.headline: Dassault Systèmes reveals trading in own shares in latest disclosure.
Aramco acquires 25% stake in Unioil to enter Philippines retail market, expanding global network.
news.summary: Aramco, based in Dhahran, Saudi Arabia, is set to expand its brand and retail offerings by introducing Valvoline-branded lubricants at designated retail stations in the Philippines. This move signifies a significant step in Aramco's strategic plan to enhance its global retail network in lucrative markets. The transaction is indicative of their commitment to growth and expansion as they continue to widen their presence in key markets worldwide.

news.headline: IKO reveals new identity at IRE 2025: redesigned website, impact-resistant shingles, future of roofing showcased. ROOFPRO program supports contractors.
news.summary: Introducing a fresh brand image with a revamped website to enhance customer experience, showcasing reliability and efficiency. All IKO Laminate Shingles are now officially impact-resistant, offering enhanced durability. Discover "Tomorrow's Roof Today" with a glimpse into the future of roofing, featuring ranges from Better to Best to Luxury. The popular IKO ROOFPRO Loyalty Program persists in empowering contractors, fostering growth and support within the industry.

news.headline: Winmark Corp. reports net income of $39,954,200 for year 2024 ($10.89/share) and $9,583,100 for Q4 ($2.60/share). Revenues: $81,289,100.
news.summary: Minneapolis-based Winmark Corporation (Nasdaq: WINA) reported a net income of $39,954,200 for the fiscal year ending on December 28, 2024, translating to $10.89 per share diluted. This marks a slight decrease from the previous year's net income of $40,178,100, or $11.04 per share diluted in 2023. In the fourth quarter of 2024, net income was $9,583,100, or $2.60 per share diluted, showing a decrease from the same period in 2023 where net income was $9,716,800, or $2.64 per share diluted. Revenues for the fiscal year ending on December 28, 2024, amounted to $81,289,100, down from $83,24.

news.headline: Trump would like an agreement with China to also include issues like nuclear weapons security - NYT.
Trump has expressed interest in a deal that would include substantial investments and commitments from china to buy more American products - NYT.
Green River Distilling Co. revives legacy with first brand advertising in 100+ years, featuring G.R. the Ghost. #RaiseYourSpirits
news.summary: In Owensboro, Kentucky, Green River Distilling Co., the 10th oldest licensed distillery in the state, has launched its first contemporary brand advertising campaign in more than a century. The campaign pays homage to its long-standing history with a playful reference to the past and prominently features G.R., the Ghost of Green River, as the spokesperson. The national campaign will be showcased on streaming TV, digital video, social media, and outdoor platforms to reach a wide audience. This marks a significant shift in the marketing strategy for the distillery, embracing modern channels to engage consumers.

news.headline: Israel charges soldiers over mistreatment of prisoners, sparking national debate.
Global agricultural parametric insurance market set to grow at 6.5% CAGR, reaching $11.3 billion by 2033 from $5.9 billion in 2023.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the "Agricultural Parametric Insurance Market," which was valued at $5.9 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $11.3 billion by 2033, with a growth rate of 6.5% from 2024 to 2033. The growth is attributed to factors like government support, policy initiatives, and demand for faster claims processing. However, limited awareness in rural areas may hinder market growth, while emerging countries offer potential for expansion. The report covers segments like types, provider channels, and regions in the forecast period of 2024-2033, with a base year of 2023.

news.headline: Trump eyes a bigger and better trade deal with China - NYT.
RIKB 38 0215 Treasury bonds auction with Maturity Date 10:30-11:00 am, allowing additional 10% purchase. Bond settles electronically.
news.summary: During the Auction Date, from 10:30 a.m. to 11:00 a.m., the Government Debt Management plans to auction Treasury bonds in the specified Series. The ISIN number and Maturity Date can be found in the provided table. As per Article 6 of the General Terms of Auction for Treasury bonds, buyers have the option to acquire an additional 10%. The Treasury bonds are set to be electronically delivered on the Settlement Date.

news.headline: Customers in Vacaville can now buy the 2025 Toyota Corolla at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville, bringing stylish, fuel-efficient, tech-savvy features.
news.summary: Vacaville residents now have the opportunity to drive the 2025 Toyota Corolla at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville, offering style, fuel efficiency, and advanced technology. The sedan has garnered significant excitement among locals and is set to make a splash in the region. This model year promises an elevated driving experience with cutting-edge features and a sleek design. Visit Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville today to test drive the 2025 Toyota Corolla and experience the hype firsthand.

news.headline: Commercial gaming revenue in the US hit $71.92B in 2024, marking fourth consecutive year of record revenue growth.
news.summary: In 2024, commercial gaming revenue in the United States soared to a new peak, hitting $71.92 billion, as reported by the American Gaming Association (AGA)'s Commercial Gaming Revenue Tracker. This figure represents a notable increase of 7.5% compared to the previous year's high of $66.5 billion in 2023.

news.headline: Provident Industrial is expanding Gateway Logistics Park with 497,280 SF in EL PASO, adding 3 Class A industrial buildings.
news.summary: In El Paso, Texas on February 19, 2025, Provident Industrial, a division of Provident based in Dallas, revealed the initiation of Phase 4 development at Gateway Logistics Park. This latest phase will introduce three Class A industrial structures, collectively spanning 497,280 square feet, expanding the existing facilities.

news.headline: Sukamal Banerjee appointed as Executive Director and CEO of Cyient's DET business on Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: In Hyderabad, India, on February 19, 2025, Cyient Limited, an international company providing Intelligent Engineering solutions, appointed Sukamal Banerjee as the new Executive Director and Chief Executive Officer of its DET business. Starting his role on the same day, Banerjee will also join as a member of the board.

news.headline: Yiwu Market, the largest in the world, experiences heavy orders on Yiwugo.com. Retailer Zhang Shidan working tirelessly.
news.summary: In Yiwu, China, on February 19, 2025, Yiwugo.com, the official website of the Yiwu Commodity Market, stands out as the world's biggest commodity wholesale market. Zhang Shidan, the proprietor of Jinshang Daily Necessities in Yiwu, has recently been tirelessly dedicating himself to work. Leading up to the Spring Festival...

news.headline: RainFocus celebrates event innovators at INSIGHT 2025 awards ceremony for their excellence using their platform in Utah on Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: In a recent event held in Lehi, Utah on February 19, 2025, several organizations were honored for their innovative and exceptional use of the RainFocus platform. RainFocus™, a leading provider of advanced event marketing solutions, acknowledged these organizations during its annual Innovation Awards ceremony. This recognition underscored their forward-thinking approach and excellence in utilizing the RainFocus platform. The event celebrated the achievements of these organizations and highlighted their contributions to the industry.

news.headline: Marriott Bonvoy partners with Manchester United to offer lucky fan a stay in the Captain's Suite at Old Trafford.
news.summary: A fortunate supporter will have the chance to meet a legendary athlete, stay overnight in the newly renovated Marriott Hotels' Suite of Dreams at Old Trafford, and immerse themselves in the matchday atmosphere of the Manchester Derby. The event, set to take place on February 19, 2025, is made possible through a special collaboration with Manchester United.

news.headline: Nicklaus Children's Hospital in Miami acquires Carpediem device for infant dialysis, first hospital in Florida to do so.
news.summary: In Miami on February 19, 2025, Nicklaus Children's Hospital announced their acquisition of Mozarc Medical's Carpediem™ Cardio Renal Pediatric Dialysis Emergency Machine. This advanced technology is specially designed to provide dialysis treatment to newborns suffering from acute kidney injury and fluid overload. Nicklaus Children's Hospital is leading the way as the first healthcare facility in Florida to have this life-saving equipment. This acquisition signifies a significant advancement in pediatric care, allowing for more effective and specialized treatment for the youngest patients in need.

news.headline: CompassMSP wins SonicWall's 2025 Managed Security Partner of the Year Award for cybersecurity excellence. Trusted partner protecting small to mid-sized businesses.
news.summary: Located in West Hartford, Connecticut, CompassMSP has been named SonicWall’s 2025 Managed Security Partner of the Year. This prestigious recognition showcases their commitment to delivering cutting-edge cybersecurity solutions for small to mid-sized businesses. The award reflects their efforts in safeguarding clients against the constantly changing landscape of threats. The SonicWall Partner Awards celebrate companies that offer superior security services. CompassMSP, as a valued SonicWall partner, remains devoted to this mission.

news.headline: DOGE by Elon Musk raises concerns by acquiring data from federal agencies, despite ongoing legal battles.
news.summary: Staff members affiliated with Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency are currently obtaining access to large quantities of data maintained by federal agencies. This development is occurring amidst legal actions attempting to prevent their access.

news.headline: US House Leader Scalise: The House is to vote next week on the budget - Punchbowl.
Lab developed tests aid in diagnosing children, crucial for treating various conditions. PRNewswire WASHINGTON Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: Located in Room 2045 of the Rayburn House Office Building in Washington, a recent report highlighted the significant impact of laboratory developed tests in diagnosing and treating various conditions impacting pediatric patients. The Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine emphasized the integral role these tests play in modern healthcare. The report, released on February 19, 2025, underscored the importance of these tests in delivering accurate and timely diagnoses for pediatric conditions.

news.headline: Goodwill Industries of Dallas appoints Alexandra Mazzi as new VP of Marketing, a seasoned exec with an impressive track record.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 19, 2025, Goodwill Industries of Dallas has introduced Alexandra Mazzi as its Vice President of Marketing. With a wealth of experience in marketing, Mazzi has been appointed to lead the organization towards growth and success. This strategic decision highlights the importance of effective marketing for Goodwill Industries of Dallas.

news.headline: Essential Utilities increasing dividend to $0.3255 per share in June 2025, marking a 6.0% increase from 2024.
news.summary: Essential Utilities Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3255 per share, payable on June 2, 2025, to shareholders of record on May 13, 2025. This marks a 6.0% increase from the previous year's dividend of $0.3071 per share. Essential Utilities has a track record of 80 years of consecutive quarterly cash dividend payments.

news.headline: WTO: Discussions on China-US trade tensions were constructive, a large number of countries called for restraint.
Trump considers a new trade deal with China to boost American exports and investments.
news.summary: American officials are exploring the possibility of reaching an agreement with China to increase their acquisitions of U.S. products and investments.

news.headline: Louisiana-Pacific (LPX) Q4 earnings beat expectations: net sales up 3.5% YoY to $681M, adjusted EPS at $1.03, beating consensus of $0.86.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, Louisiana-Pacific Corp (NYSE:LPX) saw a 3.5% increase in net sales YoY, reaching $681 million, surpassing the expected $666.753 million. The company experienced a 9% growth in siding revenue to $362 million, driven by higher volumes and prices. Conversely, OSB sales declined 2% to $267 million due to reduced prices despite higher volumes. Gross profit rose by 1.9% YoY to $162 million, with a margin decrease of 38 bps to 23.8%. The operating margin dropped from 13.5% to 11% YoY. Adjusted EPS stood at $1.03, up from $0.71 YoY, outperforming the consensus of $0.86. Net income also increased by $4 million.

news.headline: Billionaires seek Saudi investment in Miami with Trump's support at event.
PROS named a CPQ solutions leader by Forrester Research in Q1 2025, cited for AI-powered selling.
news.summary: In Houston, PROS Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PRO), a top provider of AI-driven SaaS pricing and selling solutions, was declared a Leader in The Forrester WaveTM: Configure, Price, Quote Solutions, Q1 2025. This recognition underscores PROS's role in aiding businesses to enhance sales interactions and transactions across all channels, ultimately boosting growth and profit maximization. This acknowledgment by Forrester Research signifies confidence in PROS's capabilities to optimize sales processes.

news.headline: Glion Institute of Higher Education in Switzerland, founded in 1962, is a leader in luxury education and hospitality, focusing on customer experience.
news.summary: Located in Montreux, Switzerland, Glion Institute of Higher Education is renowned for its excellence in hospitality and luxury education. Since its establishment in 1962, the institute has been a pioneer in shaping the future of customer experience. With innovative programs that meet industry standards, Glion continues to be a benchmark in the field. In 2025, Glion is at the forefront, with a reputation for excellence in education and a focus on industry expectations.

news.headline: Private equity firms facing resistance on removing investor safeguards amid backlash.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases has surged to over 500,000 globally, with more than 25,000 deaths. In the United States alone, there are now over 100,000 confirmed cases, making it the country with the highest number of cases worldwide. The pandemic has led to widespread lockdowns and travel restrictions in an effort to curb the spread of the virus. Healthcare systems are being overwhelmed, leading to shortages of medical supplies and personnel. Governments around the world are implementing various measures to support their economies and provide assistance to those affected by the crisis. The situation remains fluid and continues to evolve rapidly as experts work on finding ways to contain the outbreak.

news.headline: Windstar will extend offerings in Southeast Asia in 2026 with new ship Star Seeker, including 17 itinerary variations.
news.summary: Today in Miami, Windstar Cruises announced its 2026 Southeast Asia program for the newly launched yacht, Star Seeker, set to debut in December 2025. The cruise line is introducing two main itineraries that can be combined in 17 different ways, along with optional inland pre- and post-Cruise Tour packages. This program provides a diverse array of travel choices for passengers looking to explore the region.

news.headline: SteelSky Ventures invests in Posterity Health to enhance fertility care through technology, a significant advancement for women's health. #FertilityTech #Investment #WomenInHealth
news.summary: Atlanta, today SteelSky Ventures, a prominent women's health fund, announced a strategic investment in Posterity Health, a tech-based platform specializing in enhancing fertility procedures. This move marks a significant advancement as SteelSky Ventures continues to lead in the women's health sector. The specific amount of the investment was not disclosed.

news.headline: OneCause awards 2025 tech grants: Chix 4 A Cause and WeCare each receive $10,000 fundraising software grants.
news.summary: Chix 4 A Cause and WeCare have been awarded $10,000 each in fundraising software grants to assist them in advancing their missions and fostering positive change. This announcement was made by OneCause, a prominent provider of event and online fundraising technology, on February 19, 2025, in Indianapolis. It was part of the 2025 OneCause grant program aimed at supporting organizations driving positive impact.

news.headline: Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 44/100 = Fear
Colgate-Palmolive buys Prime100, fresh pet food brand, aligning with strategy to expand market presence.
news.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) is expanding its presence in the pet food sector with the acquisition of Care TopCo Pty Ltd, the owner of Prime100, an Australian fresh pet food brand. Established in 2014 in Melbourne, Australia, Prime100 produces refrigerated and shelf-stable pet food, distributed through various channels including pet care retailers in Australia. This move is part of Colgate-Palmolive's strategy to capitalize on fast-growing markets that enhance its core business areas and reinforce its position in the industry.

news.headline: Stacy Brown-Philpot secures $172M to support diverse founders.
Activist investors impact oil industry as Trump bump falters.
Novo Nordisk sues KBP Biosciences over alleged data misrepresentation in $1.3B hypertension drug deal, seeks damages.
news.summary: Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE:NVO) has recently taken legal action by filing an urgent request for a global freezing order against KBP Biosciences Pte. Ltd. and Dr. Huang Zhenhua, who is the founder, Executive Chairman, and holds a 40% stake in KBP. The dispute stems from Novo Nordisk's accusation that KBP provided misleading information that led to the acquisition of the rights to Ocedurenone, a medication designed for treating hypertension and kidney diseases. Novo Nordisk claims that KBP did not disclose vital data indicating the drug's inefficacy. This legal move comes after Novo Nordisk's purchase of the rights to ocedurenone in October 2023 for a substantial sum of up to $1.3 billion. For further details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Elon Musk's SpaceX is in discussions to raise funds with a potential valuation of $44 billion.
NY Times wins 3 Polk Awards for investigations into extremism in Israel, Sudan civil war, and a Russian soldier's defection.
news.summary: The Times received recognition for its in-depth reporting on extremism in Israel, its comprehensive coverage of the civil war in Sudan, and a compelling story detailing the journey of a Russian soldier who deserted the conflict in Ukraine. These stories shed light on significant global issues and captivated audiences with their detailed insights and unique perspectives. The Times continues to excel in delivering impactful journalism, with a high level of journalism recognized for its quality and importance.

news.headline: Catch the latest Bloomberg Surveillance TV episode on February 19, 2025, for key market insights.
Electric vehicle sales surge in China, overshadowing premium car market. Porsche faces challenges as consumers opt for tech-loaded affordable EVs. German automakers affected.
news.summary: Chinese consumers are increasingly purchasing economical electric cars equipped with cutting-edge technology, a shift impacting high-end vehicle markets and posing challenges for German automakers.

news.headline: Trimble Inc beat Q4 revenue expectations with $983.4 million, up 5% YoY. Organic growth was 17%. Annualized recurring revenue hit $2.26 billion, up 14% YoY. Adjusted EPS exceeded estimates at 89 cents.
news.summary: Trimble Inc, listed on NASDAQ as TRMB, disclosed a 5% year-over-year revenue increase for Q4 2024, reaching $983.4 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $944.4 million. The organic revenue growth in the quarter stood at 17% Y/Y. The annualized recurring revenue rose to $2.26 billion, showing a 14% increase Y/Y on both reported and organic bases. The company's adjusted earnings per share (EPS) were reported at 89 cents, exceeding the analyst consensus of 88 cents. Furthermore, the adjusted gross margin saw a 300 basis points increase Y/Y.
